headline: PharmaEssentia Appoints Eric Vogel as U.S. Head of Commercialization Ahead of Potential Launch of BESREMi® in Essential Thrombocythemia
summary: BURLINGTON, Mass., May 27, 2026--PharmaEssentia Corporation (TWSE: 6446), a global biopharmaceutical company headquartered in Taiwan, announced that Eric Vogel has joined the company as U.S. Head of Commercialization. A seasoned commercial leader with more than 20 years of experience in oncology and hematology, Vogel will support Samuel Lin, Head of Global Operations, in driving the commercial growth of BESREMi® (ropeginterferon alfa-2b-njft) for approved uses across global markets.
